privileged_info_summary: The task uses 10 synthetic expenses from January 2024 (2024-01-05 to 2024-01-30) involving three roommates: Alice, Bob, and Carol. Expenses total $2,082.75 with mixed split types (5 equal splits, 5 personal assignments). Verified amounts paid: Alice $1,707.25, Bob $218.30, Carol $157.20. Expected balances: Alice owes nothing and is owed $1,030.00; Bob owes $478.95; Carol owes $551.05. The zero-sum property holds perfectly (sum = $0.00). The task has a 180-second timeout, max 15 steps, and medium difficulty.
